_comment: Canonical golden fixture for the deterministic practice-card shuffle (FLA-200). Both the shared Kotlin SessionOrdering (:shared:jvmTest ShuffleParityFixtureTest) and the web TS runner (webApp Vitest) load this file and must reproduce `expectedOrder` exactly for a deck of `size` cards shuffled with `seed`, keeping the mulberry32 Fisher-Yates in lockstep across platforms. Generated from the Kotlin implementation; a drift on either side fails CI.
